scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm run build && BUCKET=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmDocsSite-staging-split --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`DocsSiteBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) && DIST_ID=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmDocsSite-staging-split --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`DocsSiteDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) && aws s3 sync .vitepress/dist/ s3://$BUCKET --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $DIST_ID --paths '/*'
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build && BUCKET=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmDocsSite-prod --profile prod --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`DocsSiteBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) && DIST_ID=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmDocsSite-prod --profile prod --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`DocsSiteDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) && aws s3 sync .vitepress/dist/ s3://$BUCKET --delete --profile prod && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $DIST_ID --paths '/*' --profile prod
